metadata.title:
FORCE CITY TO ACT


AS THE ARBITRATOR

pages.raw_text:
To some of the officials at the city
hall the only Interpretation that can
be put on a special matter to come
up for consideration at the council
proceedings tonight is that the Spo-
kane Traction company wants the city
fathers to settle differences that have
been brought out between the Graves
people and the Washington Water
Power company over the right to
string trolley wires on Sinto avenue
east Of Division street.


The Washington Water Power COM
pany has line of poles for electric
light wires on one side Of the street
ana the telephone company has row
Of poles for telephone wires on the
other side of the street. The two
street car companies have not been
